nodes.name: reschedule.rs
nodes.summary: risectl commands for rescheduling streaming fragments across workers and unregistering worker nodes with interactive confirmation.

nodes.name: resume_backfill.rs
nodes.summary: risectl command to resume a paused backfill operation for a specific streaming job or fragment.

nodes.name: serving.rs
nodes.summary: risectl command to list serving fragment vnode mappings showing virtual node to worker assignments for read queries.

nodes.name: source_props.rs
nodes.summary: risectl commands to alter source connector properties, reset source splits, and inject source offset overrides.

nodes.name: table.rs
nodes.summary: Module root for table-related risectl commands, re-exporting the list sub-module.

nodes.name: list.rs
nodes.summary: risectl command to list all state tables registered in the meta service.

nodes.name: test.rs
nodes.summary: risectl test command to verify JVM initialization for Java binding functionality.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_dml crate implementing DML (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) operation handling for streaming tables.

nodes.name: how-to-write-a-rpc-service.md
nodes.summary: Developer guide explaining how to define, implement, and use RPC services in RisingWave covering proto definitions and client/server setup.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_error crate providing error type definitions and conversion utilities.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_expr crate implementing the expression evaluation framework.

nodes.name: expr.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks comprehensively covering all scalar and aggregate function expressions using auto-generated test inputs from the function registry.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_expr_impl crate containing built-in scalar and aggregate function implementations.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief documentation for the expr impl crate describing how built-in functions are registered and tested.

nodes.name: sig.rs
nodes.summary: Tests verifying that all registered function signatures in the expression registry are well-formed and can be instantiated.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_expr_macro proc-macro crate providing the function! and build_function! macros.

nodes.name: gen.rs
nodes.summary: Code generation logic for the expression proc-macro framework that produces function registration and dispatch code for scalar and aggregate expressions.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_frontend crate implementing the SQL query planner, optimizer, and scheduler.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_frontend_macro proc-macro crate providing frontend-specific derive macros.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Proc-macro library for the frontend crate providing derive macros for plan nodes and operator implementations.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Planner test harness library that drives SQL logical and physical plan tests by comparing generated plans against expected YAML output.

nodes.name: resolve_id.rs
nodes.summary: Utility for resolving object IDs in planner test output to stable names for deterministic test comparison.

nodes.name: planner_test_runner.rs
nodes.summary: Test runner entry point that discovers and executes all planner test cases from the test directory.

nodes.name: additional_column.rs
nodes.summary: Handler logic for CREATE SOURCE additional columns including system column definitions and metadata column derivation.

nodes.name: external_schema.rs
nodes.summary: Dispatcher for external schema extraction from various formats (Avro, Protobuf, JSON, Debezium, Iceberg, Nexmark) during CREATE SOURCE.

nodes.name: ReschedulePayload
nodes.summary: Deserialized YAML payload for the reschedule command containing revision and per-worker actor count changes.

nodes.name: WorkerReschedulePlan
nodes.summary: Per-worker reschedule plan specifying actor count differences parsed from YAML or string input.

nodes.name: RescheduleInput
nodes.summary: Enum representing reschedule input as either an inline string plan or a file path to a YAML plan.

nodes.name: reschedule
nodes.summary: Executes fragment rescheduling by parsing the plan, resolving no-shuffle dependencies, and invoking the meta client reschedule RPC.

nodes.name: unregister_workers
nodes.summary: Unregisters worker nodes from the cluster after optional fragment occupancy check and interactive user confirmation.

nodes.name: list_serving_fragment_mappings
nodes.summary: Lists serving vnode mappings in tabular format showing virtual node distribution across workers for each streaming fragment.

nodes.name: bench_expr
nodes.summary: Comprehensive benchmark iterating all registered scalar and aggregate function signatures and measuring per-chunk evaluation latency.

nodes.name: bench_raw
nodes.summary: Raw expression evaluation benchmark measuring baseline cost for input reference and literal expression evaluation.
